text:
Created attachment 156579
Patch to update x11-themes/gnome-icons-elementary

- Update to 3.1
- Adjust LICENSE and MASTER_SITES

Replace 'x11-themes/gnome-icons/bsd.gnome-icons.mk' by it's equivalent otherwise icons are located into 'share/icons/elementaryicons3.1/' directory
